title: Vereeniging, Gauteng — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Vereeniging, Gauteng: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Vereeniging is a city in Gauteng with a population of 377,000. An industrial city on the Vaal River, part of the Vaal Triangle region known for steel and manufacturing.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
